# SUDO(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  sudo — execute as superuser

## SYNOPSIS
  sudo [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Run a command with elevated privileges.

## OPTIONS
  sudo <command>  run as root
  sudo -l  list available commands

## EXAMPLES
  sudo find / -name 'flag'
  sudo cat /etc/shadow

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

## SEE ALSO
  help, man, commands
